title: Plus adjectivos
summary: Describe things more precisely: easy, difficult, important, interesting.

teach.target: Interlingua es facile ma le grammatica anglese es difficile.
teach.roman: interlingua es facile ma le grammatica anglese es difficile
teach.english: Interlingua is easy but English grammar is difficult.
teach.ipa: ˌinterlˈiŋɡwa es fˈatsile mˈa le ɡramˈatika aŋɡlˈese es difˈitsile

canDo: Describe something as easy or difficult
Say something is important or interesting
Give a nuanced description using abstract adjectives
